name: Classy Mustard-Garlic Mayonnaise Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon fresh tarragon; chopped, or 1 teaspoon dried tarragon; crushed
1 teaspoon fresh parsley; chopped, or 1 teaspoon dried parsley; crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Blend until smooth and well combined.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Makes about 1 ¼ cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Shrimp, Crabmeat, Duck, Brussels Sprouts, Jicama, Radishes.
